preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM entities WHERE slug = 'sunita-patil-mp'

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='MP')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Sunita Patil

column.name: name_hi
column.value: सुनीता पाटील

column.name: description_en
column.value: Member of Parliament from Mumbai North. Three-term MP known for urban development and women's rights legislation.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: मुंबई उत्तर से सांसद। शहरी विकास और महिला अधिकार कानून के लिए जानी जाती हैं।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='mumbai')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sunita-patil-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: LLB, Mumbai University; MBA, IIM Ahmedabad

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='MLA')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Ravi Kumar Gowda

column.name: name_hi
column.value: रवि कुमार गौड़ा

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Bengaluru South. IT sector champion and urban infrastructure reformer.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: बेंगलुरु दक्षिण से विधायक। आईटी क्षेत्र और शहरी बुनियादी ढांचे के सुधारक।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='bengaluru-urban')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='ravi-kumar-gowda-mla') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: B.Tech Computer Science, NIT Surathkal

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='MP')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Vikram Tomar

column.name: name_hi
column.value: विक्रम तोमर

column.name: description_en
column.value: Member of Parliament from New Delhi. Focuses on digital governance and anti-corruption legislation.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: नई दिल्ली से सांसद। डिजिटल शासन और भ्रष्टाचार विरोधी कानून पर ध्यान केंद्रित।

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aap') AS _tmp)

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='new-delhi')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='vikram-tomar-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: M.A. Public Policy, JNU

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='MLA')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Meera Devi Singh

column.name: name_hi
column.value: मीरा देवी सिंह

column.name: description_en
column.value: MLA from Patna Sahib. Education and rural healthcare champion.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: पटना साहिब से विधायक। शिक्षा और ग्रामीण स्वास्थ्य सेवा की समर्थक।

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='patna')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='meera-devi-singh-mla') AS _tmp)

column.name: education
column.value: B.Sc. Nursing, Patna Medical College

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='JOURNALIST')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Arjun Mehta

column.name: name_hi
column.value: अर्जुन मेहता

column.name: description_en
column.value: Senior investigative journalist covering Indian Parliament and state politics for 15+ years. Known for RTI-driven reporting.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: 15+ वर्षों से संसद और राज्य राजनीति को कवर करने वाले वरिष्ठ पत्रकार।

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='new-delhi')

column.name: entity_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM entity_types WHERE code='SOCIAL_WORKER')

column.name: name_en
column.value: Kavita Sharma

column.name: name_hi
column.value: कविता शर्मा

column.name: description_en
column.value: Founder of Bal Shakti NGO. Has run 200+ free schools for underprivileged children across Rajasthan.

column.name: description_hi
column.value: बाल शक्ति NGO की संस्थापक। राजस्थान में 200+ नि:शुल्क स्कूल संचालित।

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='jaipur')

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media_links WHERE title_en = 'Sunita Patil''s Parliament speech on Women''s Safety Bill'

column.name: title_en
column.value: Sunita Patil's Parliament speech on Women's Safety Bill

column.name: title_hi
column.value: महिला सुरक्षा विधेयक पर सुनीता पाटील का संसद भाषण

column.name: summary_en
column.value: MP Sunita Patil delivers a powerful speech in Lok Sabha supporting the Women's Safety and Protection Bill 2024, citing ground-level data from Mumbai.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: सुनीता पाटील ने लोक सभा में महिला सुरक्षा विधेयक 2024 के समर्थन में भाषण दिया।

column.name: source_owner
column.value: Lok Sabha TV

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Sunita Patil''s Parliament speech on Women''s Safety Bill')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sunita-patil-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Vikram Tomar launches free Wi-Fi at 50 Delhi metro stations

column.name: title_hi
column.value: विक्रम तोमर ने 50 दिल्ली मेट्रो स्टेशनों पर मुफ्त वाई-फाई लॉन्च किया

column.name: summary_en
column.value: MP Vikram Tomar inaugurates free high-speed Wi-Fi at 50 Delhi metro stations, benefiting 2 million daily commuters.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: सांसद विक्रम तोमर ने 50 मेट्रो स्टेशनों पर मुफ्त वाई-फाई का उद्घाटन किया।

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Vikram Tomar launches free Wi-Fi at 50 Delhi metro stations')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='vikram-tomar-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Bengaluru flyover project: 3 years delayed, cost overrun by ₹480 crore

column.name: title_hi
column.value: बेंगलुरु फ्लाईओवर परियोजना: 3 साल की देरी, ₹480 करोड़ की अतिरिक्त लागत

column.name: summary_en
column.value: CAG audit reveals the Bengaluru South flyover project approved under MLA Ravi Kumar Gowda is 3 years behind schedule with cost overruns of ₹480 crore. Opposition demands probe.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: CAG ऑडिट में बेंगलुरु दक्षिण फ्लाईओवर परियोजना में 3 वर्ष की देरी और ₹480 करोड़ की अतिरिक्त लागत उजागर हुई।

column.name: source_owner
column.value: Deccan Herald

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Bengaluru flyover project: 3 years delayed, cost overrun by ₹480 crore')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='ravi-kumar-gowda-mla') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Meera Devi Singh announces 10 new anganwadi centres in Patna Sahib

column.name: title_hi
column.value: मीरा देवी सिंह ने पटना साहिब में 10 नए आंगनवाड़ी केंद्रों की घोषणा की

column.name: summary_en
column.value: MLA Meera Devi Singh announces state funding approval for 10 new anganwadi centres, covering 5000 children in Patna Sahib constituency.

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Meera Devi Singh announces 10 new anganwadi centres in Patna Sahib')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='meera-devi-singh-mla') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Ravi Gowda's Bengaluru Tech Corridor attracts ₹12,000 Cr investment

column.name: title_hi
column.value: रवि गौड़ा के बेंगलुरु टेक कॉरिडोर ने ₹12,000 करोड़ निवेश आकर्षित किया

column.name: summary_en
column.value: The Bengaluru South Tech Corridor championed by MLA Ravi Kumar Gowda has attracted ₹12,000 Cr in FDI, creating 45,000 jobs per NASSCOM report.

column.name: source_owner
column.value: Ravi Kumar Gowda

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Ravi Gowda''s Bengaluru Tech Corridor attracts ₹12,000 Cr investment')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='ravi-kumar-gowda-mla') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: NCRB data confirms 22% drop in Mumbai North crime since 2019

column.name: title_hi
column.value: NCRB डेटा: 2019 के बाद मुंबई उत्तर में अपराध में 22% की गिरावट

column.name: summary_en
column.value: NCRB 2024 annual report shows 22% reduction in recorded crimes in Mumbai North constituency. Cited as impact of community policing initiative backed by MP Sunita Patil.

column.name: source_owner
column.value: The Indian Express

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='NCRB data confirms 22% drop in Mumbai North crime since 2019')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='sunita-patil-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Jaipur Smart City: 40% of projects completed ahead of deadline

column.name: title_hi
column.value: जयपुर स्मार्ट सिटी: 40% परियोजनाएं समय से पहले पूर्ण

column.name: summary_en
column.value: Jaipur Smart City Mission reports 40% project completion rate ahead of deadline, with 18 projects delivered in roads, drainage, and public Wi-Fi.

column.name: source_owner
column.value: Rajasthan Patrika

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Jaipur Smart City: 40% of projects completed ahead of deadline')

column.name: district_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM districts WHERE slug='jaipur')

column.name: title_en
column.value: Amit Singh's 5-year constituency development report (2019–2024)

column.name: title_hi
column.value: अमित सिंह की 5 वर्षीय निर्वाचन क्षेत्र विकास रिपोर्ट (2019–2024)

column.name: summary_en
column.value: Official constituency report by MP Amit Singh: 245 km roads built, 18 hospitals upgraded, and 12,000 homes under PM Awas Yojana.

column.name: summary_hi
column.value: सांसद अमित सिंह की आधिकारिक रिपोर्ट: 245 किमी सड़क, 18 अस्पताल और 12,000 घर।

column.name: source_owner
column.value: Amit Singh MP Official

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Amit Singh''s 5-year constituency development report (2019–2024)')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='amit-singh-mp') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Bal Shakti NGO: Inside India's largest free school network

column.name: title_hi
column.value: बाल शक्ति NGO: भारत के सबसे बड़े नि:शुल्क स्कूल नेटवर्क के अंदर

column.name: summary_en
column.value: Documentary feature on Kavita Sharma's Bal Shakti NGO and how it is transforming education access for underprivileged children across 12 Rajasthan districts.

column.name: media_link_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM media_links WHERE title_en='Bal Shakti NGO: Inside India''s largest free school network')

column.name: entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='kavita-sharma-social-worker') AS _tmp)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM polls WHERE question_en = 'Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?'

column.name: question_en
column.value: Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य सेवा सुधार के लिए आप किस पार्टी पर सबसे अधिक भरोसा करते हैं?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: भाजपा

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: कांग्रेस

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: आप

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Which party do you trust most for improving public healthcare?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: None of the above

column.name: label_hi
column.value: इनमें से कोई नहीं

column.name: question_en
column.value: What is the biggest obstacle to good governance in India?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: भारत में सुशासन की सबसे बड़ी बाधा क्या है?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='What is the biggest obstacle to good governance in India?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: भ्रष्टाचार

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='What is the biggest obstacle to good governance in India?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Lack of transparency

column.name: label_hi
column.value: पारदर्शिता की कमी

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='What is the biggest obstacle to good governance in India?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Bureaucratic delays

column.name: label_hi
column.value: नौकरशाही देरी

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='What is the biggest obstacle to good governance in India?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Voter apathy

column.name: label_hi
column.value: मतदाता उदासीनता

column.name: question_en
column.value: Do you know your MP or MLA by name?

column.name: question_hi
column.value: क्या आप अपने सांसद या विधायक को नाम से जानते हैं?

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Do you know your MP or MLA by name?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Yes, both

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Do you know your MP or MLA by name?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Only MP

column.name: label_hi
column.value: केवल सांसद

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Do you know your MP or MLA by name?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_en
column.value: Only MLA

column.name: label_hi
column.value: केवल विधायक

column.name: poll_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM polls WHERE question_en='Do you know your MP or MLA by name?' LIMIT 1)

column.name: label_hi
column.value: दोनों नहीं

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM poll_votes WHERE poll_id = 1 AND poll_option_id = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM manifesto_promises WHERE title_en = 'Increase education budget to 6% of GDP'

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='inc') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Increase education budget to 6% of GDP

column.name: title_hi
column.value: शिक्षा बजट को GDP का 6% करना

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aap') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: 24/7 clean drinking water for every Delhi household

column.name: title_hi
column.value: दिल्ली के हर घर में 24/7 स्वच्छ पेयजल

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='aap') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Transform all government schools with world-class facilities

column.name: title_hi
column.value: सरकारी स्कूलों को विश्वस्तरीय सुविधाओं से लैस करना

column.name: party_entity_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM entities WHERE slug='bjp') AS _tmp)

column.name: title_en
column.value: Double farmers' income by 2025

column.name: title_hi
column.value: 2025 तक किसानों की आय दोगुनी करना
